MISSING_LOOP_SURFACE: LOOP_SURFACE environment variable is not set; cannot pin runtime identity. Set LOOP_SURFACE to one of: .claude, .factory, .mastracode before starting the MCP server.
INVALID_LOOP_SURFACE: LOOP_SURFACE='{value}' is not a recognized surface. Allowed surfaces: {allowed}.
PIN_NOT_INITIALIZED: pinRuntimeIdAtBoot() has not been called; getPinnedRuntimeId() is unavailable until the pin is set at boot.
